summary: Complete testing of multi-bank account feature for invoices. All 12 backend API tests pass (100%). All frontend UI elements working correctly including bank account CRUD in Configuration page, bank filter in Factures page, and bank account selector in invoice creation dialog.

issues: Existing invoices show '-' in Banque column (expected - migration progressive)

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/comptes-bancaires returns list of bank accounts
Backend: POST /api/comptes-bancaires creates new bank account
Backend: POST /api/comptes-bancaires with is_default=True sets as default
Backend: GET /api/comptes-bancaires/{id} returns specific account
Backend: GET /api/comptes-bancaires/{id} returns 404 for non-existent
Backend: PUT /api/comptes-bancaires/{id} updates bank account
Backend: PUT /api/comptes-bancaires/{id} returns 404 for non-existent
Backend: DELETE /api/comptes-bancaires/{id} deletes bank account
Backend: DELETE /api/comptes-bancaires/{id} returns 404 for non-existent
Backend: Setting new default removes old default
Backend: GET /api/factures includes compte_bancaire fields
Backend: Existing 3 bank accounts verified (Crédit Agricole, BNP Paribas, Société Générale)
Frontend: Configuration page loads with Comptes Bancaires section
Frontend: 3 bank accounts displayed in Configuration page
Frontend: Add compte button opens dialog with all fields (nom, IBAN, BIC, default switch)
Frontend: Edit compte button opens pre-filled dialog
Frontend: Delete buttons present for all accounts
Frontend: Crédit Agricole marked as 'Par défaut'
Frontend: Factures page has bank filter dropdown with all 3 banks
Frontend: Factures page has Banque column in table
Frontend: Generate facture dialog has bank account selector
Frontend: Bank account selector shows all 3 banks with default marked
Frontend: Default bank (Crédit Agricole) pre-selected in invoice creation
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent missing aria-describedby warning in console (accessibility improvement)
seed_data_creation: 3 bank accounts pre-created by main agent: Crédit Agricole (default), BNP Paribas, Société Générale
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-bank account feature fully working. Bank accounts CRUD at /api/comptes-bancaires. Configuration page has Comptes Bancaires section with add/edit/delete. Factures page has bank filter and bank account selector in invoice creation. Existing invoices don't have bank account (migration progressive). Default bank is Crédit Agricole.

comptes_bancaires_crud.description: Full CRUD for bank accounts with default account logic

features: List of bank accounts with IBAN/BIC

factures_bank_filter.description: Filter dropdown to filter invoices by bank

factures_bank_column.description: Banque column in invoices table showing bank name

factures_bank_selector.description: Bank account selector in invoice creation with default pre-selected

facture_detail_bank_info.description: Bank info section shows when invoice has bank account associated
